title: Electroporation using BioRad MicroPulser
author: Jonathan Miller
materials: Plate cells onto selective agar plates.

steps.title: Prepare electrocompetent bacterial cells and keep them on ice
steps.instruction: Prepare electrocompetent bacterial cells and keep them on ice.

steps.title: Add 1–2 µL of plasmid DNA...
steps.instruction: Add 1–2 µL of plasmid DNA to ~50 µL of competent cells. Gently mix.

steps.title: Transfer the mixture into a pre-chilled electroporation cuvette (0
steps.instruction: Transfer the mixture into a pre-chilled electroporation cuvette (0.1 cm gap).

steps.title: Insert the cuvette into the BioRad MicroPulser
steps.instruction: Insert the cuvette into the BioRad MicroPulser.

steps.title: Apply the electrical pulse using the appropriate preset (e
steps.instruction: Apply the electrical pulse using the appropriate preset (e.g., Ec1 for E. coli ).

steps.title: Immediately add 950 µL of SOC...
steps.instruction: Immediately add 950 µL of SOC or LB recovery media to the cuvette.

steps.title: Transfer the cells to a sterile culture tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the cells to a sterile culture tube.

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C with shaking for 1 hour
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C with shaking for 1 hour.
